summary: List Company Action Plan Template Items
description: Gets the list of Company Action Plan Template Items

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[plan_template_section_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Template Section ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[plan_template_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Template ID.

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.

items.description: Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee (Compact)

holding_type.description: Company Plan Template Item holding type specifies whether the current item holds all the succeeding items in the section or the plan

plan_template_id.description: ID the Company Action Plan Template Item belongs to

position.description: Position among other Company Action Plan Template Items within a Company Action Plan Template Section

plan_template_section_id.description: ID of the Company Action Plan Template Section the Company Action Plan Template Item belongs to

due_at.description: Due date for the template item
